problem_statement: Nested Mind exposes a distributed lease execution receipt that binds an execution plan, adapter report, lease claim receipt, accepted decision, and verification rules before a distributed scheduler lease can be treated as executable. Mullu Control Plane now has distributed lease claim and adapter registry receipts, but it lacks the execution receipt boundary that composes those receipts into a ready, delegated, or blocked execution admissibility decision without performing live backend work.
success_criteria: Distributed lease execution receipts bind execution plan hash, adapter registry receipt hash, claim receipt hash, operation payload hash, job identity, worker identity, backend kind, and expected payload hash
SQLite compare-and-swap can be classified as execution_receipt_ready only when the adapter registry receipt is adapter_ready
External HTTP gateway can be classified as execution_delegated without performing a live HTTP request
Native Postgres, Redis, etcd, and Consul execution blocks when adapter registry evidence is blocked or non-production
Underlying claim receipt violations block execution before scheduler mutation or worker dispatch
Delegated claim-approved external gateway execution binds a granted claim outcome before it is treated as admissible
Backends that require fencing tokens block when adapter capability does not support fencing tokens
Raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material blocks receipt admission
The distributed lease execution receipt is schema-backed, indexed in the governance protocol manifest, and included in proof coverage matrix witnesses
No live SQLite, Postgres, Redis, etcd, Consul, HTTP gateway, scheduler mutation, worker dispatch, credential minting, deployment, or production readiness claim is introduced
non_goals: no live distributed lease backend call
no production readiness claim beyond local receipt contract classification
constraints: execution receipt evaluation must remain deterministic and non-live
execution receipts must bind adapter registry receipt hash and claim receipt hash
execution admissibility must fail closed when adapter or claim evidence is blocked
local execution readiness must be limited to ready compare-and-swap adapter receipts
external gateway execution must be represented as delegation, not local execution
scheduler mutation and worker dispatch flags must remain false
raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material must fail closed
acceptance_tests: python -m py_compile gateway/distributed_lease_execution.py gateway/distributed_lease_adapters.py gateway/distributed_lease_boundary.py scripts/proof_coverage_matrix.py
evidence_required: focused distributed lease execution receipt test receipt
standalone SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
